issues.description: Missing first effect entirely. Card has two effects: (1) passive '[Your Turn]' effect that boosts Leader power when trash ≥19, and (2) Activated Main ability. DSL only captures second effect.
Trigger should be 'Activated' with 'activation':'Main', but this effect is missing the Main activation context and cost requirements (rest self + 3 DON!! cards).

PlayFromHand action missing cost constraint. Effect text specifies 'cost equal to or less than the number of DON!! cards on your field' — this must be included as a filter condition, not just color/type/cardType.
Condition is 'Always' but should include HasAttachedDon condition (player must have 3+ DON!! cards to activate, implied by 'rest... 3 of your DON!! cards').
